summary: EqWD ranks #1 on ImageNet ResNet-50 (3 seeds, 45 epochs) with 72.27 ± 0.20%, lowest variance among all methods. Results provide sufficient foundation for paper writing. Proceed with parallel track: writing + 90-epoch experiments.

cifar100_resnet20_200ep.note: beta=5.0 gives 66.07% (not used in main experiment)

strengths: CWD/CPR failure diagnosis provides independent theoretical contribution
Phi Invariance Conjecture and MI=0 finding validated experimentally
Dual dataset (ImageNet + CIFAR-100) + dual architecture coverage complete
weaknesses: CIFAR-100: EqWD ranks 3rd with beta=1.0 (not optimal beta=5.0)
BEM test: EqWD (68.30%) not superior to FixedWD (68.21%) under equal tuning budget

mandatory_conditions.action: Launch 90-epoch ImageNet experiments (7 methods × 3 seeds, 4 GPU parallel)
mandatory_conditions.rationale: Academic standard; 45-epoch results must be supplemented

mandatory_conditions.action: Address BEM negative result in paper
mandatory_conditions.approach: Add 'tuning efficiency analysis' subsection: EqWD achieves near-optimal with less tuning
mandatory_conditions.rationale: Honest disclosure is more defensible than reviewer discovery

mandatory_conditions.action: Add seeds 789 and 1024 for N=5 statistics
mandatory_conditions.rationale: Welch t-test with N=5 may achieve p<0.05

mandatory_conditions.action: Fix or remove Sections 5.7/5.8 (phantom figure and isolated theory block)

recommended_narrative.title: Gradient-Weight Ratio as Sufficient Statistic for Weight Decay Scheduling

three_act_structure.act1: Reveal: CWD and CPR fail systematically on ImageNet despite strong theoretical motivation
three_act_structure.act2: Diagnose: MI=0 (alignment signal has zero incremental predictive power) + Phi Invariance under AdamW
three_act_structure.act3: Resolve: EqWD as continuous ratio-deviation feedback control — 3 lines of code, #1 on ImageNet

parallel_track.week1: Launch 90-epoch experiments + fix Sections 5.7/5.8 + rewrite Abstract/Intro framework
parallel_track.week2_3: Main writing with BEM integration + Related Work update
parallel_track.week4: Update tables with 90-epoch results + N=5 statistics

risk_assessment.risk: BEM interpreted as no real advantage
Phase schedule confound invalidates ratio mechanism
Novelty challenge in crowded WD field
risk_assessment.mitigation: Emphasize Phi Invariance + MI=0 + CWD/CPR diagnostic value
